info.title: bdna
info.description: A tool for analysing BenchmarkDotNet data

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

commands.name: aggregate
commands.description: Aggregate benchmark results into a benchmark dataset.

options.name: --new
options.description: The path containing new benchmarks results.

options.name: --aggregates
options.description: The path containing the dataset to roll into.

options.name: --output
options.description: The path for the new dataset.

options.name: --runs
options.description: The number of benchmark runs to keep when aggregating.

options.name: --build
options.description: The new build's number/version. Optional.

options.name: --builduri
options.description: The new build's URL. Optional.

options.name: --branch
options.description: The new build's branch name. Optional.

options.name: --commit
options.description: The new build's commit SHA. Optional.

options.name: --tag
options.description: A tag for the new build. Optional, multiple tags can be given.

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Emit verbose logging.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

commands.name: analyse
commands.description: Analyse a benchmark dataset for performance degradation.

options.name: --tolerance
options.description: Tolerance of errors from baseline performance.

options.name: --maxerrors
options.description: The maximum number of failures to tolerate.

options.name: --statistic
options.description: The result statistic to analyse.

options.name: --filter
options.description: Filter by class or namespace. Optional, multiple filters can be given.

options.name: --aggregates
options.description: The path of the aggregated dataset to analyse.

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Emit verbose logging.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

commands.name: report
commands.description: Build reports from a benchmark dataset.

options.name: --aggregates
options.description: The path of the aggregated dataset to analyse.

options.name: --reporter
options.description: The reporting style. Optional, multiple reporters can be given.

options.name: --output
options.description: The path for reports.

options.name: --filter
options.description: Filter by class or namespace. Optional, multiple filters can be given.

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Emit verbose logging.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.
